flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $8.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $8.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
